description: Interactive Chemical Plant map for Creatures of the Deep — fish, creatures, items, and the map monster.
intro: Chemical Plant is the first so-called "VIP" area in Creatures of the Deep. It has the unusual characteristic of being available only from Friday to Sunday. To travel there, you do not need gold: you need VIP tickets. The entry cost ranges from 0 to 200 VIP tickets, and the exact price at any given time depends on how many players are visiting the area. Another unique feature: you will be alone. The zone is instanced, meaning you will never encounter other players there. One more particularity: the minigames for some species are very different from those on other maps. To learn more about these mechanics, click on a fish in the side menu.
name: Chemical Plant
title: Chemical Plant map
